case_title: YAMAMURA, CRAIG (REGISTERED OWNER AND DRIVER) VS MIKELADZE, MARINA (REGISTERED OWNER AND DRIVER)

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YAMAMURA, CRAIG (REGISTERED OWNER AND DRIVER) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIKELADZE, MARINA (REGISTERED OWNER AND DRIVER) $491.37 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $517.37 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
